intent_nl: For each record in the input list, produce an object whose 'key' comes from the record's a.b.c path and whose 'value' comes from its d.e.f path.

samples.intent_nl: For each record in the input list, produce an object whose 'key' comes from the record's a.b.c path and whose 'value' comes from its d.e.f path.

coverage.description: Each record maps to one {key, value} object.
An empty input list yields an empty list (the root value is the list itself, so no JSON-pointer list kind applies).
